name: glob
description: Find files matching a glob pattern. The pattern embeds the path (e.g., 'src/**/*.ts', '*.json', 'docs/**/*.md').

pattern.description: Glob pattern with optional path prefix (e.g., '*.ts', 'lib/**/*.js', 'tests/**/*.{test,spec}.ts')

baseDir.description: Base directory to evaluate pattern from (defaults to '.')
